forecasts.noForecastData: No forecast data for this item

settings.modelTrainingDesc: Train forecasting models individually or all at once (one after another).
settings.dataCleanupDesc: Remove stale model runs and forecasts from previous training sessions.
settings.deleteInactiveDesc: Removes old model runs, their forecasts, class metrics, and top items that are no longer active.

sidebar.title: Navigation Sidebar
sidebar.desc: Use the sidebar to navigate between Dashboard, Forecasts, Inventory, and Settings. Click the coffee icon to collapse it.

modelSelector.title: Model Selector
modelSelector.desc: Switch between ML models (XGBoost, Random Forest, SARIMAX, Prophet) to compare forecasting results across different algorithms.

kpiCards.title: Key Performance Indicators
kpiCards.desc: These cards show a quick overview: Active Items count, Model Accuracy (wMAPE), and total Items Forecasted by the selected model.

topItemsChart.title: Top 10 Items by Volume
topItemsChart.desc: A bar chart showing the best-selling menu items. Use this to identify your most popular products.

forecastSummary.title: Forecast Summary
forecastSummary.desc: Detailed forecast metrics including Volume Accuracy, wMAPE, R-squared, and accuracy breakdown by item class (A, B, C).

modelPerformance.title: Model Performance Metrics
modelPerformance.desc: Core evaluation metrics for the selected model: R-squared, wMAPE, MAE, and Volume Accuracy.

abcClassification.title: ABC Classification
abcClassification.desc: Items categorized by sales volume — Class A (top ~80%), Class B (~15%), Class C (~5%). Use the tabs to explore each class.

associationRules.title: Association Rules
associationRules.desc: Market basket analysis showing which items are frequently bought together. Higher Lift means stronger association.

itemSelector.title: Item Selector
itemSelector.desc: Search and select a specific menu item to view its individual sales forecast. Click a badge to filter.

forecastChart.title: Forecast Chart
forecastChart.desc: View the predicted sales trend over time. Select an item for per-item forecast, or see the total for all items combined.

topAccuracyTable.title: Top Items by Forecast Accuracy
topAccuracyTable.desc: A table comparing actual vs predicted quantities. Green badges indicate high accuracy (≥70%), red for low (<50%).

materialFilter.title: Material Filter
materialFilter.desc: Search and filter raw materials. Click a badge to focus on a specific ingredient.

dailyRequirements.title: Daily Material Requirements
dailyRequirements.desc: A table showing the exact quantity of each raw material needed per day, based on sales forecasts and recipes.

requirementsTrend.title: Requirements Trend
requirementsTrend.desc: Total daily material requirement trend. Click a row to highlight it and compare daily totals.

modelTraining.title: Model Training
modelTraining.desc: Train individual models or all models at once. Monitor training status, view logs, and cancel running jobs.

dataCleanup.title: Data Cleanup
dataCleanup.desc: Remove stale model runs and forecasts from previous training sessions to keep your data fresh.
